site.name: Zach Lamb
site.title: 高级软件工程师
site.description: 高级软件工程师，专注于 React、TypeScript 与 AI 驱动的 Web 工具。认证 ScrumMaster，具备以人为中心的计算背景，从网络安全平台到大规模电商，构建高性能应用。

hero.title: Zach Lamb
hero.subtitle: 高级软件工程师
taglines: 我为人们打造工具 —— 也随时乐意聊聊代码、户外或奥利奥。
hero.viewResume: 查看简历（在新标签页中打开）

about.heading: 步道指南
about.body: 我是一名偏前端的全栈工程师，十多年来一直在构建人们真正喜欢使用的 Web 应用。目前在 Circadence 为网络安全从业者打造 AI 驱动的工具。此前曾帮助星巴克门店团队改善沟通，并在 StellarFi 构建设计系统。我是认证 ScrumMaster，相信优秀软件来自优秀流程和共情团队。不写代码时，你会在教瑜伽、探索科罗拉多步道、举重或争论最好吃的奥利奥口味时找到我。
about.focusAreas: React 与 TypeScript · 设计系统 · AI 工具 · 认证 ScrumMaster

privacy.pageDescription: How I handle information you share with this site — contact form data, analytics, and your rights under EU/UK privacy law.
privacy.draftBanner: This policy is a draft pending review. If anything here is unclear or you have questions, please email you@zachlamb.io.

atGlance.heading: At a glance
atGlance.body: This site collects the information you submit in the contact form — name, email, message — and nothing else. I don't run analytics that profile you.

whatICollect.heading: What I collect
whatICollect.contactForm: Contact form: the name, email address, and message you submit. These are only used to reply to you.
whatICollect.analytics: Aggregate, anonymous page metrics via Vercel Analytics. The script does not set cookies and does not build an individual profile of you.

whereItGoes.heading: Where it goes
whereItGoes.body: Your contact-form submission is sent through Resend, a US-based email delivery service, to my personal inbox. Nothing is written to a database.

retention.heading: How long I keep it
retention.body: Contact-form emails stay in my inbox indefinitely unless you ask me to delete them. Vercel Analytics retains aggregate data per its own retention policy.

rights.heading: Your rights (EU/UK)
rights.body: If you are in the EU, UK, or another jurisdiction with equivalent privacy laws, you have the right to request access to the information I hold about you, to ask for corrections or deletion, to request portability, to object to processing, and to withdraw consent. I aim to respond within 30 days. To exercise any of these rights, use the contact form or email me directly at

cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.body: I set a single functional cookie — NEXT_LOCALE — to remember your language preference. I do not set tracking, advertising, or third-party analytics cookies.

thirdParties.heading: Third parties
thirdParties.intro: This site relies on the following services that may process your information on my behalf:
thirdParties.note: Each has its own privacy policy, linked above. I don't share your information with anyone else.

contact.heading: Privacy questions
contact.body: For any privacy-related question, the fastest path is email:
